title: Navidrome Segment 05
summary: Major feature-rich segment covering internet radio support, replay gain, sharing/public endpoints, Last.fm album info, artwork resolution refactoring, ListenBrainz client improvements, Nord/Electric Purple/Gruvbox/Spotify themes, server-sent events overhaul, transcoding improvements (session context cancel, cancelled cache), Prometheus metrics, SQL metrics worker, header-based auth, and a massive wave of Go dependency upgrades (Go 1.18, ginkgo v2, gomega v2, viper, beego, cobra, etc.).
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: Major feature-rich segment covering internet radio support, replay gain, sharing/public endpoints, Last.fm album info, artwork resolution refactoring, ListenBrainz client improvements, Nord/Electric Purple/Gruvbox/Spotify themes, server-sent events overhaul, transcoding improvements (session context cancel, cancelled cache), Prometheus metrics, SQL metrics worker, header-based auth, and a massive wave of Go dependency upgrades (Go 1.18, ginkgo v2, gomega v2, viper, beego, cobra, etc.).

nodes.label: React UI Frontend
nodes.description: React frontend with internet radio CRUD pages, replay gain toggle, share player, share dialogs, download menus, themes (Nord, Electric Purple, Gruvbox Dark, Spotify), reduced motion player, seek bar, current song keyboard shortcut, audio player with radio support, and playlist genre/comment columns. Touched by PRs for radio (2063), replay gain (2061), shares (2002), themes (1889, 1899, 2012), and more.

nodes.label: Core Business Logic
nodes.description: Core services including artwork refactoring (resolution readers, album/artist/mediafile/playlist artwork), external metadata with Last.fm album info, agents (ListenBrainz, Last.fm, Spotify), media streamer, transcoder with context cancellation, scrobbler, share functionality, auth module, and metrics. Touched by PRs for artwork refactor (2053), Last.fm album info (2061), radio (2063), local album art (2080), transcoding cancel (2150), and metrics (2002).

nodes.label: Subsonic API Layer
nodes.description: Subsonic REST API with internet radio endpoints, sharing endpoints, replay gain responses, album info endpoint, browsing improvements, stream with context cancellation, response snapshots overhaul (ginkgo v2 migration), and wire injection updates. Touched by PRs for radio (2063), Last.fm info (2061), shares (2002), metadata refresh (2144), and cover art (2157).

nodes.label: Server Infrastructure
nodes.description: HTTP server with public share endpoints (images, streams), backgrounds handler, native API (radio, translations), serve_index with new config, SSE events, auth with header-based auto accounts, and middleware improvements. Touched by PRs for shares (2002), Prometheus (1830), radio (2063), header auth (2087), and routing 404s (1894).

nodes.label: Persistence Layer
nodes.description: Repository implementations with radio repository, share repository, playlist repository improvements, genre repository for artwork, user repository for header auth, and base repository refactoring for beego/squirrel. Touched by PRs for radio (2063), shares (2002), artwork (2053, 2080), and electric purple theme (1889).

nodes.label: Go Dependencies
nodes.description: Go module dependency management including Go 1.18 toolchain, ginkgo v2, gomega v2, beego v2, viper 1.14/1.15, cobra, testify, go-sqlite3, httprate, prometheus client, lestrrat-jwx, bluemonday, logrus, chi-cors, kr/pretty, and many more library upgrades.

nodes.label: Utility Libraries
nodes.description: Shared utilities including cache/file_caches, cached HTTP client, file helpers, gravatar, number utils, pipeline utilities (pl), pool, slice helpers, singleton, atomic, index group parser, strings, and weighted random chooser. Touched by PRs for artwork (2053), shares (2002), and various improvements.

nodes.label: Domain Models
nodes.description: Domain models including radio station, share with expiration, artwork ID types, file types for new formats, media file with replay gain fields, playlist with new fields, album with image paths, and criteria DSL improvements. Touched by PRs for radio (2063), Last.fm info (2061), artwork (2053), and shares (2002).

nodes.label: Media Scanner
nodes.description: Tag scanner with refresher for artwork, metadata reading with taglib wrapper (illumos build support), playlist importer, walk_dir_tree, and mapping improvements for replay gain and MusicBrainz release track ID. Touched by PRs for artwork (2053), taglib illumos (2069), and various scanner fixes.

nodes.label: Database Migrations
nodes.description: Schema migrations for internet radio table, share table recreation, album image paths, replay gain metadata, album info, MusicBrainz release track ID, path list separator changes, and touch playlists. Touched by PRs for radio (2063), shares (2002), artwork (2053), and Last.fm info (2061).

nodes.label: CLI Commands
nodes.description: CLI entry points with wire injection for new services, root command with Prometheus metrics and SQL worker config, scan command updates, signaler for non-unix platforms, and pls utility command. Touched by PRs for metrics (2002), artwork (2053), and shares.

nodes.label: Configuration & Constants
nodes.description: Application configuration for new features (Prometheus, header auth, artwork resolution, radio), constants (version, mime types, AAC default), and logging improvements. Touched by PRs for Prometheus (1830), artwork (2053), radio (2063), and header auth (2087).

edges.label: UI uses public share endpoints and SSE
API serializes domain models to responses
Core reads feature flags and settings
Server uses core for shares and streaming
